plan_version.description: Plan version the critique targets (vN from the plan.vN.md filename).

summary.description: Brief overall verdict on the plan. Target ~2–3 sentences and at most ~500 characters; 700 is a hard cap with headroom, not a goal. Do not enumerate issues.

issues.description: Structured list of issues. An empty array means the plan is accepted.

id.description: Issue identifier within this iteration: C1, C2, ...

addresses.description: ID of the immediate parent issue from a previous iteration that this issue refines. Use the most recent iteration covering this concern, for example v2.C1. Null if new.

severity.description: blocker — the plan cannot be executed as is; major — a serious gap; minor — an improvement; nit — taste.

claim.description: The critic's concrete claim. One sentence.

evidence.description: A quote from the plan or a path:line reference. Without evidence the issue is dropped by the validator as a hallucination.

suggested_fix.description: What exactly to change in the plan. An action, not a wish.

confidence.description: Critic confidence 0..1 or null. <0.5 — the judge may reject even plausible-looking issues.

duplicate_of.description: Id of the rejected-log.jsonl entry on a repeat. Null if not a repeat. When non-null the severity must be nit.
